linting.notes: Monorepo uses Turbo for orchestration. ESLint uses custom @odh-dashboard/eslint-config. Lint produces 161 warnings but passes (warnings don't fail build).

testing.framework: Jest (unit tests), Cypress (e2e tests), Ginkgo/Gomega (Go tests)
testing.mock_patterns: Jest manual mocks in __mocks__/, Cypress intercepts
testing.notes: Monorepo with multiple test suites. Unit tests run via Turbo (npm run test-unit). Cypress tests require building static assets first (npm run cypress:server:build). Contract tests exist for BFF services (npm run test:contract). Go BFF services have their own test suites (make test in packages/*/bff).

advisory_checks.name: Modular Architecture Quality Gates
advisory_checks.command: Assessment of testing maturity per module

ci.notes: Main gating workflow is .github/workflows/test.yml which runs on push/pull_request. Requires Node 22.x. Uses Turbo cache. Go BFF services have separate workflows with golangci-lint. Tekton pipelines exist for deployment automation.

build.system: npm, Turbo, Make (for containers and Go)
build.notes: Monorepo managed by npm workspaces + Turbo. Frontend uses Webpack for bundling. Backend is a Fastify Node.js server. BFF services are Go binaries built with make. Container images built with Dockerfile (multi-stage).

conventions.import_style: ES modules, absolute imports from @odh-dashboard/* packages, path aliases configured in tsconfig
conventions.notes: Monorepo packages use @odh-dashboard/* namespace. Shared configs in packages/eslint-config, packages/jest-config, packages/tsconfig. Pre-commit hooks via Husky run lint-staged.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with 161 warnings (non-fatal). Turbo orchestrates linting across all workspaces.

test_commands.notes: Partial failure: @odh-dashboard/internal has type errors (missing type declarations for monaco-editor and @patternfly/react-topology). Other packages pass.
Passed: 9 test suites successful (cached via Turbo). Tests run in parallel across workspaces.

container_recipe.notes: For Go BFF tests, need Go 1.24+ installed and additional dependencies (envtest, golangci-lint). Cypress tests require pre-built static assets. Container validation used Node 22.22.1 + npm 10.9.4.

results.output_snippet: up to date, audited packages... (Turbo postinstall ran successfully)
results.notes: Dependencies installed cleanly. Turbo postinstall ran install:module for nested packages.

results.output_snippet: Tasks: 19 successful, 19 total (161 warnings found but non-fatal)
results.notes: Lint passed with warnings. All 19 workspace packages linted successfully.

results.output_snippet: ERROR: @odh-dashboard/internal#type-check exited (2). Type errors in frontend/src regarding monaco-editor and @patternfly/react-topology.
results.notes: Type-check failed for 1 package (@odh-dashboard/internal). 5 packages cached/passed. Known issue with missing type declarations.

results.output_snippet: Tasks: 9 successful, 9 total. Test suites: 1 passed (per package), multiple packages tested.
results.notes: Unit tests passed. Turbo cached results for some packages. Tests run in parallel.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (161 warnings), type-check PARTIAL (1 package failed), tests OK (9 suites passed)

gaps: Type-check fails for @odh-dashboard/internal due to missing type declarations (monaco-editor, @patternfly/react-topology)
Cypress e2e tests require pre-built static assets and cannot run in basic validation without additional build steps
Go BFF tests require Go toolchain (1.24+) and envtest setup not included in Node container
Contract tests require Go setup and cannot be validated in Node-only environment
Some npm packages report security vulnerabilities (noted in install output)
Full CI validation requires external services/infrastructure not accessible in isolated container
